summary: Run one standalone TrackCenter diagnostic after the r01 pODMR count-gate failure.
scientific_rationale: The strong-pi pODMR produced zero averages because the in-experiment count gate reported post-run Final=6.584 kcps, while the immediately preceding standalone TrackCenter was 38.629 kcps. A single bounded retrack diagnostic distinguishes simple drift/focus handoff from a non-trackable candidate; it does not by itself prove resonance alignment.
comparison_targets: pODMR failed result NVBridge:RunExperimentIncomplete with Final=6.584 kcps
expected_evidence: track_center_v1 terminal result with final counts and position
whether counts recover above 8 kcps after retracking
stop_conditions: bridge queue becomes occupied before submission
TrackCenter fails or count collapse persists
bridge_action: queue standalone track_center_v1 execute diagnostic via enqueue_nv_imaging_direct.py
